# Methods and Settings

```{r settings_pdf_text}
#| echo: false
#| eval: true

gencode_meta <- cps_report$settings$reference_data$source_metadata |>
  dplyr::filter(source_abbreviation == "gencode")
gencode_label <- paste0(
  "GENCODE ",
  if (isTRUE(as.logical(cps_report$settings$conf$vep$vep_gencode_basic)))
    "basic set" else "all transcripts",
  " (v", gencode_meta$source_version, ")"
)
```

This report was generated with _CPSR_ v`r cps_report$settings$software$cpsr_version`
(backed by _PCGR_ v`r cps_report$settings$software$pcgr_version`).

| Setting | Value |
|---|---|
| Genome assembly | `r cps_report$settings$genome_assembly` |
| Max gnomAD MAF (non-ClinVar variants) | `r cps_report$settings$conf$variant_classification$max_af_gnomad` |
| ClinVar trust level | `r cps_report$settings$conf$variant_classification$clinvar_trust_level` |
| Secondary findings (ACMG) | `r as.logical(cps_report$settings$conf$variant_classification$secondary_findings)` |
| Pharmacogenomic findings | `r as.logical(cps_report$settings$conf$variant_classification$pgx_findings)` |
| VEP transcript set | `r gencode_label` |
| VEP regulatory annotation | `r as.logical(cps_report$settings$conf$vep$vep_regulatory)` |

: Run configuration {tbl-colwidths="[45,55]"}
